ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "invoice_no" INTEGER /* Invoice number for the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the customer (e.g., customer, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., gifts, home goods) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product (e.g., decorations, furniture) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the product reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the shipping address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address for shipping */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for shipping */,
  "state" TEXT /* State for shipping */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for shipping */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer service representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer service representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer service representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer service representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "order_status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the update belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the update was made */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer service representative who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES customer_service_representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., email_notifications) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., true or false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "preference_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category that the sub-category belongs to */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)
